spaces.name: West Gate
spaces.desc: Your stronghold.

spaces.name: Waystation
spaces.desc: A rest stop — gain a skip token.

ability.label: Sanctuary
ability.desc: Gain one skip token — cancel any single forfeit.

spaces.name: Dusty Road
spaces.desc: A quiet road leading inward.

spaces.name: Bleakfen
spaces.desc: Cursed marshland. Landing here hurts.

spaces.name: Edge Post
spaces.desc: A commanding ridge position.

ability.label: Edge Order
ability.desc: Your opponent must edge once before the next session.

spaces.name: Ashwood
spaces.desc: Dense forest, easy to pass through.

spaces.name: The Vault
spaces.desc: A fortified strongroom.

ability.label: Vault Shield
ability.desc: Cancel one forfeit assigned to you this session.

spaces.name: Dungeon Gate
spaces.desc: Entrance to a punishing dungeon.

ability.label: Dungeon Sentence
ability.desc: Assign your opponent a 5-minute punishment forfeit.

spaces.name: Iron Peak
spaces.desc: Contested high ground. Must be won by duel.

spaces.name: North Toll
spaces.desc: A guarded crossing — pay the toll to pass.

spaces.name: The Crossing
spaces.desc: The main junction where all roads meet.

spaces.name: South Toll
spaces.desc: A southern guarded crossing.

spaces.name: The Narrows
spaces.desc: A tight northern bottleneck.

spaces.name: Iron Gate
spaces.desc: The great gate to the inner realm.

spaces.name: The Deep
spaces.desc: A dark southern passage of strategic value.

spaces.name: Iron Throne
spaces.desc: A seat of power overlooking the realm.

ability.label: Royal Decree
ability.desc: Double one forfeit assigned to your opponent this session.

spaces.name: Crown Spire
spaces.desc: The heart of the realm. The most powerful position.

ability.label: Royal Command
ability.desc: Write a custom forfeit for your opponent — anything goes.

spaces.name: The Sanctum
spaces.desc: An inner sanctum. Holding it locks out opponent's defences.

ability.label: Sanctum Lock
ability.desc: Your opponent cannot use any skip tokens this session.

spaces.name: The Breach
spaces.desc: A contested gap in the eastern defences.

spaces.name: The Mirror
spaces.desc: A mysterious reflecting pool.

ability.label: Mirror Curse
ability.desc: Reflect one incoming forfeit back at your opponent this session.

spaces.name: The Gauntlet
spaces.desc: A brutal trial. Landing here is very punishing.

spaces.name: East Toll
spaces.desc: The eastern tollway.

spaces.name: The Overlook
spaces.desc: A high vantage point with commanding views.

ability.label: The Overlook
ability.desc: Choose what your opponent wears during the next session.

spaces.name: Cinderpass
spaces.desc: A scorched passage through the eastern hills.

spaces.name: Ridgepath
spaces.desc: A high ridge near the eastern gate.

ability.label: Ridge Rule
ability.desc: Assign your opponent a 10-minute edging session before the next session.

spaces.name: Saltmere
spaces.desc: A coastal stronghold with cruel tides.

ability.label: Saltmere Surge
ability.desc: All forfeits assigned to your opponent this session run at maximum intensity.

spaces.name: Waystation
spaces.desc: An eastern rest stop — gain a skip token.

ability.label: Sanctuary
ability.desc: Gain one skip token — cancel any single forfeit.

spaces.name: East Gate
spaces.desc: The eastern stronghold.
